Kinder Morgan Q3 Earnings: Revenue Miss, EPS Miss, Guidance Lower, Shares Slide
data.description: Kinder Morgan reported third-quarter revenue of $3.699 billion, missing the consensus estimate of $3.975 billion, according to Benzinga Pro. The company reported quarterly earnings of 25 cents per share, missing analyst estimates of 27 cents per share.

data.title: If You Invested $1,000 In Bitcoin When Tesla Bought The Leading Cryptocurrency, Here's How Much You'd Have Today
data.description: Leading cryptocurrency Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) hit new all-time highs in March 2024 and could be headed to higher highs ahead of the 2024 presidential election.

data.title: 'Money' Floyd Mayweather To Spend $402M On Affordable NYC Apartment Portfolio
data.description: The undefeated boxer purchased a 1,000-unit affordable housing portfolio, spread across more than 60 buildings in Upper Manhattan.
